Our Story

A Legacy of Trust & Quality

New Velmurugan Textiles & Readymade is more than a store — it's a family legacy woven with trust, quality, and community love. Founded on 05 September 2009 by Mr. M. Kathiresan in the heart of Thamaraipakkam, Thiruvallur, our store has proudly served thousands of families across the region for over 16 years.


Mr. Kathiresan brings with him 35+ years of deep expertise in the textile industry, ensuring our customers always get access to the finest fabrics, latest fashion trends, and timeless traditional wear — all at prices that respect every family's budget. We carry forward the values of integrity, warmth, and genuine service.

🚀 Deploy to GitHub Pages & Google Search

Follow these steps to get New Velmurugan Textiles live and searchable on Google using your GitHub account (DivyaDharshiniKathiresan) and Gmail (divyadharshini.k003@gmail.com).

1
Go to github.com/DivyaDharshiniKathiresan → Click New Repository → Name it: new-velmurugan-textiles
2
Upload index.html to the repository root. Then go to Settings → Pages → Source: main branch → Save
3
Your live URL will be: https://divyadharshini.github.io/new-velmurugan-textiles/
4
Sign in to Google Search Console with divyadharshini.k003@gmail.com → Add Property → Enter your GitHub Pages URL → Verify ownership
5
In Search Console → Sitemaps → Submit: sitemap.xml (file included in download). Google will start indexing within 1–7 days.
6
Set up Google Analytics with the same Gmail → Get your G-XXXXXXXXXX tracking ID → Uncomment the Analytics code in index.html
🐱 GitHub Profile → ➕ Create New Repo → 🔍 Google Search Console → 📊 Google Analytics →
📧 Use divyadharshini.k003@gmail.com for all Google services (Search Console, Analytics, Business Profile)
